item.title: Extremely broken slabs, 3rd May
item.description:
These slabs are very broken, uneven and dangerous. The cause has been HGV delivering to the new development on the corner . The developer should foot the bill

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 336, Old Farm Avenue, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urgent, 3rd May
item.description:
A very poor effort by Veolia Veolia should never let weeds grow so much that they obstruct any part of the pavement Please urgently remove it is the highway and not an open space

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Claremont Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car reg LF09 YKX not moved, 3rd May
item.description:
Car on street, not been moved. Has damage to vehicle and partly blocking a driveway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Corner, 3rd May
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, Kilburn, London

item.category: Obstruction - Overgrown / overhanging private tree / hedge

item.title: Dead fox on the pavement, 3rd May
item.description:
Fox was found last night in the middle of the road. We went over to check on her and see if shes moving- she moved out of the road onto the pavement. Tried calling rescue volunteers and rspca. But no one replied on time. Fox was found this morning dead

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barnfield Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pinned, 3rd May
item.description:
Please remove all the weeds the brent side looks neglected whist the Westminster side does not.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
